/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-mtmd-cli.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-mtmd-cli.dir/mtmd-cli.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-mtmd-cli  -Wl,-rpath,/home/randy/llama.cpp/bin: ../../common/libcommon.a ../../bin/libmtmd.so /usr/lib/libcurl.so ../../bin/libllama.so ../../bin/libggml.so ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so ../../bin/libggml-cuda.so ../../bin/libggml-base.so /opt/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so
